economic_notes: Acden Companies LP paid $3,563,903 of expenses on behalf of the First Nation. ACFN Industry Investments LP earned $7,754,631 net income. Nation operates multiple business enterprises through modified equity method entities.
notes: Complex consolidated entity with 10 fully consolidated subsidiaries/departments and 5 government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. Funds held in trust and restricted investments of $91,098,367 are significant. Accumulated remeasurement gains of $12,180,401 are separate from accumulated surplus. Total accumulated surplus including remeasurement gains is $191,390,854. Investment in Nation business entities is $64,465,489. Acden Companies LP is the primary GBE. Distributions due to minors of $3,349,756 represent a unique liability. Ottawa Trust Fund included in consolidation. ISC funding calculated from statement; total government transfers include ISC ($7,971,265), CMHC ($351,655), Nutrition North Canada ($838,830), FNDF ($1,359,700), Indigenous skills and employment training ($188,115) = $10,709,565 rounded to $10,710,450. OSR includes store revenue, industry contributions, investment income, rental income, other revenue, industry grants, joint venture income, and earnings from business entities net of deferred revenue adjustments.
